tools.name: travel_drive_time
tools.description: Get estimated drive time, walking time, or cycling time between two locations. Resolves addresses to coordinates via Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) and calculates the route using OSRM. Works for cities, street addresses, landmarks, and 'lat,lon' coordinate strings. No API key required.

from.description: Starting location — address, city, landmark, or 'lat,lon' coordinates

to.description: Destination location — address, city, landmark, or 'lat,lon' coordinates

useWhen: the user asks for drive time, walk time, or cycling time between two places
the user wants to know how long it takes to travel between two locations
the user asks for distance between two places
avoidWhen: the user needs real-time traffic data — this tool uses typical estimated times
the user needs transit schedules (bus/train) — use a transit-specific service
typicalInputs: from Austin TX to Houston TX
New York Penn Station to JFK Airport
Times Square New York to Central Park walking
tools.returnsSummaryShape: estimated travel duration and distance with resolved location names

tools.name: travel_geocode
tools.description: Resolve a place name, address, or landmark to geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude). Returns the canonical display name and coordinates. Useful for location lookups, mapping queries, and as a precursor to routing or weather lookups.

address.description: Address, city, landmark, or place name to resolve to coordinates

useWhen: the user wants to find the coordinates of a location
the user asks where a place is or what its coordinates are
tools.returnsSummaryShape: latitude, longitude, and canonical display name for the resolved location

shortDescription: Drive time, walk time, cycling time, and geocoding via free OpenStreetMap APIs — no API key required
orchestratorUseCases: answer questions about travel time and distance between places
geocode addresses or place names to coordinates
